tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove redundant Home "Switch modpack" button
tasks.description:
Delete the Home view's Switch modpack button (duplicates the topbar profile chip); remove its test and i18n key. See plan doc Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/views/Home.tsx","src/views/Home.test.tsx","src/i18n/locales/en.json","src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/views/Home.test.tsx src/App.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["no Switch modpack button on Home","empty wrapper/unused prop removed","topbar chip still switches","home.secondary.switch removed from en + zh-Hans"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Bundle sidecar module (.sts2mm-bundle.json)
tasks.description:
Backend bundle module: BundleSidecar type, read/write, is_bundle_container, bundle_container_name. See plan doc Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src-tauri/src/mods/bundle.rs","src-tauri/src/mods/mod.rs","src-tauri/src/mods/install.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --manifest-path=src-tauri/Cargo.toml mods::bundle","acceptanceCriteria":["BundleSidecar serde fields","SIDECAR_FILENAME","read/write round-trip + None when absent","is_bundle_container","bundle_container_name strips nexus suffix + sanitizes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Install multi-member archive into one named container + sidecar
tasks.description:
Multi-member (>=2) archives extract into one container named by bundle_container_name + minimal sidecar; single-folder unchanged. See plan doc Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src-tauri/src/mods/install.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --manifest-path=src-tauri/Cargo.toml mods::install","acceptanceCriteria":["multi-member -> one named container + sidecar","no rollback with b41666e","single-folder -> no sidecar unchanged","container named from archive stem"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Scan tags bundle members + get_bundles command
tasks.description:
Add ModInfo.bundle_id; tag members of sidecar containers during scan; add get_bundles command. See plan doc Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src-tauri/src/mods/mod.rs","src-tauri/src/mods/scan.rs","src-tauri/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --manifest-path=src-tauri/Cargo.toml mods::","acceptanceCriteria":["ModInfo.bundle_id defaulted None everywhere","sidecar container tags members with container folder name","no sidecar -> bundle_id None","get_bundles returns one BundleInfo per sidecar container"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Downloads-watcher enriches sidecar with Nexus link + version
tasks.description:
On Nexus/auto-install, fill the bundle sidecar with display_name + Nexus link + version via a pure enrich_bundle_sidecar helper. See plan doc Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src-tauri/src/mods/bundle.rs","src-tauri/src/downloads_watcher.rs","src-tauri/tests/qa_scenarios.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --manifest-path=src-tauri/Cargo.toml bundle","acceptanceCriteria":["sidecar enriched with Nexus title/link/version on auto-install","single mod install no sidecar","source at bundle level (no member UNLINKED)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — render a bundle as one collapsible row
tasks.description:
Group members by bundle_id into one row (display name + Nexus link + version); comfortable lists members, compact name-only. See plan doc Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/types.ts","src/hooks/useTauri.ts","src/contexts/AppContext.tsx","src/hooks/useModLibrary.tsx","src/components/LibraryTable.tsx","src/components/BundleRow.tsx","src/styles.css","src/i18n/locales/en.json","src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json","src/components/LibraryTable.test.tsx","src/components/BundleRow.test.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"npx vitest run src/components/LibraryTable.test.tsx src/components/BundleRow.test.tsx","acceptanceCriteria":["members sharing bundle_id render as one row","comfortable lists members, compact name-only","bundle row shows Nexus link + version, no member UNLINKED","search matches bundle name + member names"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Phase 1 verification gate (real Alice zip end-to-end)
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Prove Phase 1 on the real Alice zip: one container, one bundle, one linked row. See plan doc Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"cargo test --manifest-path=src-tauri/Cargo.toml && npx vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["cargo test 0 failed (count captured)","vitest 0 failed (count captured)","real Alice zip -> one container+sidecar, 4 members, get_bundles len 1 (throwaway test then removed)","app shows one linked bundle row with member list (screenshot)"],"userGate":true,"tags":["user-gate"]}
```
